text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What's this? "A blinding light, the stage of
miracles..." As radiant as ever, I see...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But I shall not be overshadowed!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I swore I would give the crowd the show of a
lifetime. And I intend to keep that promise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm no longer that little girl watching you go. I'm
forging my own path now... Mother.
